creator: johan@stromnet.se
text:
Confirm, has changed mail address from stromnet.org to stromnet.se

On Nov 30, 2006, at 13:20 , Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of net-p2p/rblibtorrent,
>
> Please note that PR ports/106059 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106059
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
